Title: Shûte~n hebi no michi! Omê Kaiô-sama ka?
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Toshio Furukawa, Kôhei Miyauchi
Plot: THE END OF SNAKE WAY: Gohan turns into a Great Saiyan Ape when he looks at an image of moon being projected in the sky from Goku's Saiyan spacecraft. Elsewhere, Goku reaches the end of Snake Way and meets King Kai.
